page: Amazon Web Services c9gd.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. It features 96 physical cores on an arm64 architecture, running at 2.8 GHz with a dedicated CPU allocation and one thread per core. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance includes 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage, offering high-speed, low-latency local data access. It operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this configuration.

The arm64 architecture and dedicated core design provide high compute density and energy efficiency relative to traditional x86 architectures. The combination of high-core-count compute, 192.0 GB of RAM, and 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage makes this server suitable for compute-intensive workloads that require fast local storage, such as distributed databases, data analytics, video encoding, and high-performance web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor and powered by custom AWS Graviton arm64 processors. The server features 96 dedicated physical cores running at 2.8 GHz with one thread per core, paired with 192.0 GB of system memory. It includes 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. Designed without a GPU, this instance offers a balanced 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, delivering high compute density and energy efficiency. The combination of high-performance arm64 cores and substantial local NVMe storage makes this instance highly suitable for compute-heavy workloads that require rapid local data access, such as distributed databases, large-scale data analytics, and containerized microservices.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c9gd.24xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated Graviton cores, 192 GB of RAM, 5700 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 50 Gbps network bandwidth.

tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and fifty gigabits per second network bandwidth.
bullet_points: Powered by 96 dedicated AWS Graviton arm64 cores running at 2.8 GHz
Equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Includes 5700 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
Provides 50 Gbps baseline network bandwidth via the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for distributed databases, data analytics, and compute-heavy workloads
